name: runno-code-sandbox
description: The @runno/mcp server provides a run_code tool that AI assistants can use to execute code snippets in various programming languages. It leverages the @runno/sandbox package, which uses WebAssembly to create isolated environments for code execution. The result of the code execution is provided over STDIO.
